# Arjun Bojja

> Backend Infrastructure Engineer / AI Infrastructure specialist. Incoming Software Engineering Intern at Microsoft (Teams), previously at Capital One. University of Maryland, College Park, Class of 2027.

Arjun builds LLM-powered pipelines, event-driven architectures, observability tooling, and low-latency distributed systems. This site is his personal portfolio: background, work experience, projects, and contact information.

## Pages

- [Home](https://arjunbojja.com/): Overview, hero introduction, and navigation to all sections.
- [About](https://arjunbojja.com/#about): Background, skills (languages, frameworks, cloud, distributed systems, AI/LLM, data & observability), and education.
- [Experience](https://arjunbojja.com/#experience): Professional experience at Microsoft, Capital One, and prior roles.
- [Projects](https://arjunbojja.com/#projects): Selected engineering projects with descriptions and impact metrics.
- [Contact](https://arjunbojja.com/#contact): Ways to get in touch, including email and LinkedIn.

## Resources

- [Resume (PDF)](https://arjunbojja.com/Arjun_Bojja_Resume.pdf): Full resume.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/arjun-bojja/): Professional profile.
